# Security Policy

We take the security of our project seriously. If you find a vulnerability or exploit, please help us protect the community by reporting it responsibly.

## 🛡️ Supported Versions

We actively monitor and patch the following versions of our codebase:

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| v1.0.x  | ✅ Active Support   |
| < v1.0  | ❌ Unsupported     |

## 📧 How to Report a Vulnerability

**Please do not open a public GitHub issue for security exploits.**

If you discover a security vulnerability, please follow these steps:
1. Email your findings directly to **your-security-email@domain.com**.
2. Include a detailed description of the exploit and step-by-step instructions or code to reproduce it.
3. Allow us up to 48 hours to respond and confirm the vulnerability.

## ⏱️ Our Response Process

* **Acknowledge:** We will respond to your private email within 48 hours to verify the report.
* **Patch:** Our core maintainers will build and test a patch within 7 days.
* **Disclose:** We will release the security patch (`v1.0.x`) and publicly credit you for the discovery in our release notes.
